Waypoint.name: Dormitory
Waypoint.label: Dormitory
Waypoint.Question: I'm heading down to the training field.

Waypoint.name: Pool
Waypoint.label: Pool
Waypoint.Question: I am sweating like an old pig.

Waypoint.name: Temple
Waypoint.label: Temple
Waypoint.Question: Inanna, grant me strength, patience, simplicity and love.

Waypoint.name: BackToDorm
Waypoint.label: BackToDorm
Waypoint.Question: A wonderful day! Time to relax.
